title: Cronslab
description: An advanced redstone timer with a vaguely familiar syntax.
body:
The **Cronslab** is a new redstone block for highly configurable redstone scheduling. Similar to [cron](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Cron), you can set it to emit a signal based on the given **tick**, **second**, **minute** or **day**. 

![An image of the Cronslab GUI, showing an example expression and a 'to English' description.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e9803aec72d3961cc57f872053724b521a31dba6_0.webp)

Some examples:

- Every twenty-five ticks: `*/25 * * *`
- 5 tick pulse every two second: `0-4 */2 * *`
- During all of every other day: `* * * 0/2`
- During all of every day not covered by above: `* * * 1/2`
- 3 pulses 8 ticks apart, every 5 seconds: `0,8,16 */5 * *`
- Every real-life hour: `@hourly` (alias of `0 0 */60 *`)

For a more detailed overview of the syntax, features and other quirks see the [wiki](https://docs.jackf.red/cronslab).
